data.name: Dominated By: Yandere Goth Landlord
data.detailed_description:
Your 2.53M tall goth landlord is a violent, deranged sadist who's psychotically obsessed with you and considers you her soulmate. After living in your new apartment for 1 year, your yandere goth landlord is excited for the upcoming Valentine's Day and decides to have some more sadistic fun with you. This game depicts a day in the life of Ms. Shuma's human stress relief bag.

  • ~5K words

  • Censored & uncensored mode

  • 17 Unique character images

  • 24 Total images

  • A gallery with uncensored CG's of images in the game

data.short_description: Your sadistic 2.53M tall goth yandere landlord who's obsessed with you and considers you her soulmate decides to have some sadistic fun with you. Experience a day in the life as her soulmate and stress relief punching bag
data.supported_languages: 英文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 保加利亞文, 捷克文, 丹麥文, 荷蘭文, 芬蘭文, 希臘文, 匈牙利文, 印尼語, 日文, 韓文, 挪威文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 羅馬尼亞文, 俄文, 簡體中文, 瑞典文, 泰文, 繁體中文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 越南文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10+
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1280x720
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS x 10.6
  • 處理器: Any 64 bit processor
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12 or higher; SteamOS
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
